seo.metaTitle: Competitive Intelligence for SMBs | White-Label | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Brand listening and competitor insights — track sentiment, monitor competitors, and stay ahead of market trends under your brand.

hero.headline: Brand Listening — Competitor Insights Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: Track what customers say about your SMB clients, monitor competitor moves, and surface opportunities before the market shifts.
hero.description: Deliver competitive intelligence as a white-label service: sentiment, share of voice, and actionable alerts — without building an in-house analytics team.

items.title: Monitor brand health
items.body: See mentions, sentiment, and trends across channels in one partner-branded view.

items.title: Watch competitors
items.body: Benchmark campaigns, offers, and positioning to stay a step ahead.

items.title: Act on alerts
items.body: Surface spikes, risks, and opportunities so SMBs respond quickly.

features.heading: Intelligence SMBs Actually Use
features.intro: Purpose-built workflows for small business operators — not enterprise dashboards that overwhelm.

cards.title: Listening & alerts
cards.body: Configurable keywords, competitors, and notification rules.

cards.title: Benchmarking
cards.body: Compare performance and visibility against chosen competitors.

cards.title: Sentiment & themes
cards.body: Understand what customers love — and what needs fixing.

cards.title: White-label reporting
cards.body: Export-ready summaries under your brand for QBRs and upsell.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Sticky, High-Value Add-On
partnerAdvantage.intro: Intelligence deepens your advisory role and creates natural upsell into marketing, SEO, and reputation products.

items.title: Differentiate beyond connectivity
items.body: Move from pipes and products to strategic insight.

items.title: Bundle with marketing stack
items.body: Pair with SEO, directories, and social for full-funnel narratives.

items.title: Recurring engagement
items.body: Ongoing monitoring drives touchpoints and reduces churn.

lifecycleFit.heading: From Visibility to Action
lifecycleFit.intro: Competitive intelligence fits after a business is online and visible — when they need to understand performance and threats.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Identity and email establish the business.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO and listings drive discovery — intelligence explains who wins.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Paid and lifecycle campaigns capitalize on insight.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Sell intelligence as the layer that explains performance across search, social, and reputation — and opens the door to optimization services.

cta.headline: Ready to Add Competitive Intelligence?
cta.body: Talk to Hostopia about packaging brand and competitor monitoring under your brand.
